instruction: Convert the following Network DSL into VyOS CLI commands.
input:
metadata:
  device: leaf1
  role: leaf
underlay:
  bgp_asn: 65101
  router_id: 10.0.0.11
  spines:
  - name: spine1
    neighbor_ip: 172.16.1.1
    remote_asn: 65000
  - name: spine2
    neighbor_ip: 172.16.1.2
    remote_asn: 65000
overlay:
  vnis:
  - id: 10000
    vlan: 10
    vrf: TENANT_1
    gateway: 192.168.70.1/24
    description: Segment for Tenant 1
output:
set system host-name 'leaf1'
set protocols bgp system-as '65101'
set protocols bgp parameters router-id '10.0.0.11'
set protocols bgp neighbor 172.16.1.1 remote-as '65000'
set protocols bgp neighbor 172.16.1.1 address-family l2vpn evpn
set protocols bgp neighbor 172.16.1.2 remote-as '65000'
set protocols bgp neighbor 172.16.1.2 address-family l2vpn evpn
set interfaces vxlan vxlan0 source-address 'lo'
set protocols bgp address-family l2vpn evpn advertise-all-vni
set interfaces vxlan vxlan0 vni 10000
set interfaces bridge br10 member interface vxlan0 vni 10000
set interfaces bridge br10 address '192.168.70.1/24'
set protocols bgp address-family l2vpn evpn vni 10000 advertise-svi-ip
